messengerList.title: Messenger List
messengerList.description: May contain promotions, and it will send only to people that subscribed to your Messenger list.

messengerActiveContacts.title: Messenger Active Contacts
messengerActiveContacts.description: May contain promotions and will only be sent to users who messaged your bot within the last 24h.

messengerAccountUpdate.title: Messenger Account Update
messengerAccountUpdate.description: Notify the user of a non-recurring change to their application or account.

messengerConfirmedEventUpdate.title: Messenger Confirmed Event Update
messengerConfirmedEventUpdate.description: Send the user reminders or updates for an event they have registered for (e.g., purchased tickets). This tag may be used for upcoming events and events in progress.

messengerPostPurchaseUpdate.title: Messenger Post Purchase Update
messengerPostPurchaseUpdate.description: Notify the user of an update on a recent purchase. Confirmation of transaction, such as invoices or receipts, Notifications of shipment status, such as product in-transit, shipped, delivered, or delayed.

magicLink.nameHint: Appended after /r/{workspaceId}/ in the public tracking URL. Use letters, numbers, underscore, and hyphen only.
magicLink.urlHint: Use double braces in the URL, e.g. https://example.com/page?utm_campaign='{{campaign}}'. Values come from the tracking link query string.

instagram.description: This integration lets you create Instagram bots.
instagram.iceBreakersDescription: Ice breakers provide a way for users to start a conversation with your bot by showing a list of frequently asked questions.
instagram.title: Instagram

messenger.description: This integration lets you create Messenger bots.
messenger.welcomeMessageDescription: This is the first message the user will receive from your Bot. This message is sent when the user interacts for the first time with the Bot by clicking on the 'Get Started' button.
messenger.greetingDescription: The greeting message that people see on the welcome screen of your Bot. The welcome screen is displayed for people who interact with your Bot for the first time. This is the message the user will see before clicking the 'Get Started' button.
messenger.conversationStartersDescription: Conversation Starters provide a way for users to start a conversation with your business with a list of frequently asked questions.
messenger.persistentMenuDescription: The menu can be configured to help users to more easily discover and access your Bot features. The menu is always available to users. This menu should contain the top-level actions that users can use it at any time. Having a menu easily communicates the basic capabilities of your bot for beginners and returned users.
messenger.dynamicPersistentMenuDescription: Allows you to dynamically change the persistent menu at any time at the user level.
messenger.botProfileDescription: This setting allows you to set a different name and image for your bot
messenger.personasDescription: This setting allows you to set a different name and image for your bot
messenger.reconnectDescription: Always reconnect your bot if your Messenger bot is not responding, or if you are seem any permission error on the error log.
messenger.title: Facebook Messenger

greeting.title: Greeting
greeting.description: The greeting message that people see on the welcome screen of your Bot. The welcome screen is displayed for people who interact with your Bot for the first time. This is the message the user will see before clicking the 'Get Started' button.

connect.description: Respond to users naturally with AI powered by your business data.
